title: Tasks Document for Quest Workflow Enhancement
response:
Feedback Summary (5 comments):

Specific Text Comments:
1. "## Phase 1: Core Infrastructure (mcp-server-quest ...": I'm seeing you have handler folder and new quest .ts files that contains other quest tools in the task description. Are you planning on have a nest tool structure for mcp-server-quest, where a tool contains multiple tools inside? Also i've notive the current naming convention of the file is questCreate, but in the task description I saw quest-crud, why is that?
2. "- [ ] 3.4. Create agent-designer (optional for fut...": We're not creating agent-designer and agent-programmer in this task, that's for later.
3. "- Files: `C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\tools\git-m...": Based on what I'm seeing in C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\mcp-server\tools, I'm not sure if this `C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\tools\git-merge.ts` is a right place to put the tool.
4. " - Files: `C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\tools\git-...": Based on what I'm seeing in C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\mcp-server\tools, I'm not sure if this `C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\tools\git-push.ts` is a right place to put the tool.
5. "- [ ] 4.3. Set up mcp-server-git with KĀDI integra...": Currently, when kadi-broker starts up, it automatically starts its mcp-upstream based on what's in C:\GitHub\kadi\kadi-broker\mcp-upstreams.json, so i'm not sure if we still need to have this task.

comments.comment: I'm seeing you have handler folder and new quest .ts files that contains other quest tools in the task description. Are you planning on have a nest tool structure for mcp-server-quest, where a tool contains multiple tools inside? Also i've notive the current naming convention of the file is questCreate, but in the task description I saw quest-crud, why is that?
We're not creating agent-designer and agent-programmer in this task, that's for later.

  - Purpose: Add designer agent capability

  - _Requirements: Requirement 4 (Task Assignment to Worker Agents - designer role)_
  - _Prompt: Role: Agent Developer with TypeScript and multi-agent systems expertise | Task: Create agent-designer by cloning agent-artist structure and adapting for design tasks with appropriate worktree configuration | Restrictions: Must follow same patterns as agent-artist, maintain code consistency, configure correct worktree | Success: Agent-designer has same capabilities as agent-artist, works in correct worktree, follows established patterns_

- [ ] 3.5. Create agent-programmer (optional for future)

comments.comment: Based on what I'm seeing in C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\mcp-server\tools, I'm not sure if this `C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\tools\git-merge.ts` is a right place to put the tool.
Based on what I'm seeing in C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\mcp-server\tools, I'm not sure if this `C:\GitHub\mcp-server-git\src\tools\git-push.ts` is a right place to put the tool.
Currently, when kadi-broker starts up, it automatically starts its mcp-upstream based on what's in C:\GitHub\kadi\kadi-broker\mcp-upstreams.json, so i'm not sure if we still need to have this task.
